results.title: SEBI warns organisations over new AI 'boss scam'

results.title: BWF Japan Open 2026: PV Sindhu Reaches Maiden Final To Meet Akane Yamaguchi In Title Clash
results.description: PV Sindhu reached her maiden Japan Open Super 750 final after Chen Yufei retired injured in the semifinal. The Indian star will now face reigning world champion Akane Yamaguchi as she chases her first Super 750 title ahead of the BWF World Championships.
